message:
fix: replace --format=jsonl with --json in dog_molecule bd calls (gt-ioiz)

bd show --children does not support --format=jsonl, only --json. Both
closeRemainingSteps and discoverSteps silently failed. Fixed by using
--json and proper json.Unmarshal instead of fragile string extraction.
Removed now-unused extractJSONField function and its tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
